# Frontier Cockpit

> GitHub Copilot and agentic development observability workspace for local developer learning and Azure FinOps governance.

## Repository Purpose

This repository contains Frontier Cockpit, a local-to-enterprise observability package for GitHub Copilot. It combines Frontier Cockpit Local for local private optimization with Frontier Cockpit Hybrid for sanitized Azure rollups, governance, adoption, and leadership views.

## Primitive Inventory

| Primitive | Count | Location |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| Agents | 8 | `.github/agents/` |
| Skills | 20 | `.github/skills/` |
| Prompts | 7 | `.github/prompts/` |
| Instructions | 6 | `.github/instructions/` |

## Key Entry Points

- `README.md`: repository map and operating overview.
- `docs/`: approved strategy, playbook, guides, runbooks, and taxonomy.
- `local-otel/`: local OpenTelemetry kit, Docker stack, Azure forwarding, GitHub Enterprise ingestion, and demo scripts.
- `diagrams/`: editable draw.io architecture source and SVG exports.
- `workshop/`: hands-on labs and participant checklist.
- `.github/copilot-instructions.md`: repository-wide GitHub Copilot guidance.
- `.github/prompts/`: reusable task entry points.
- `.github/skills/`: reusable capability packs.
- `.github/agents/`: reusable GitHub Copilot personas.
- `.github/instructions/`: path-scoped repository rules.

## Validation

Run these commands before shipping changes that affect primitives or deliverables:

```bash
bash .github/scripts/audit-primitives.sh
bash .github/scripts/audit-skills.sh
bash .github/scripts/audit-external-content.sh
bash .github/scripts/validate-deliverables.sh
bash .github/scripts/validate-dashboards.sh
bash .github/scripts/generate-llms-txt.sh --check
```

For local runtime readiness, run:

```bash
local-otel/client-bootstrap.sh
local-otel/check-workshop-local.sh
```

## External Content

External agents, skills, prompts, and instructions must keep source metadata, pass portability checks, and avoid automatic installation. Curated Awesome GitHub Copilot comparisons use the `suggest-awesome-github-copilot-*` skills.
